articles.title: The BMW M2 Finally Adds an xDrive AWD Model for 2027 - Road & Track
articles.description: The xDrive AWD system chops a few tenths off the 0-60, should make the winter commute easier, and ships exclusively with the eight-speed auto.

articles.title: Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve launches October 2 - Gematsu
articles.description: Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam on October 2, publisher Bandai Namco and developer Bandai Namco Aces announced.

articles.title: Onimusha: Way of the Sword launches September 25, demo now available - Gematsu
articles.description: Onimusha: Way of the Sword will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store on September 25, Capcom announced. Both pre-orders and a free demo are available now.

articles.title: KEMURI launches in 2027 for PS5, PC - Gematsu
articles.description: KEMURI, the 2023-announced yokai possession action game from Ikumi Nakamura-led studio UNSEEN, will launch for PlayStation 5 and PC in 2027, the developer announced.

articles.title: Cyberdecks are having a moment, rejecting big tech surveillance with style and substance - TechCrunch
articles.description: Over the last few months, these DIY hardware communities have exploded in popularity as people on social media show off their solar-powered game emulators, pocket-sized ereaders, and clamshell purse computers.

articles.title: Valve Threatened to Pull Rainbow Six Siege from Steam Due to Pricing Dispute With Ubisoft, Report Says - IGN
articles.description: Valve has allegedly gone to great lengths to maintain Steam's position as a marketplace titan on PC, including one example that reportedly saw it threaten to retaliate against Ubisoft by delisting Rainbow Six Siege.
